title: US-Pakistan Relationship in Turmoil
description: The US-Pakistan relationship was strained due to various incidents. A car bomb outside the Indian embassy in Kabul killed 17 people, mostly Afghans, in 2009. The U.S.-Pakistan relationship remained uneasy amid the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan and increasing violence. An American operative's killing of two Pakistanis in Lahore further strained relations.
